digest.component_or_area: external-integration CI workflow + Jira live-test skip canary
propositions: The live Jira/LLM external test tier can only ever skip because the workflow provides no JIRA_* secrets and does not install the acli binary, so Jira API/SDK drift merges with no real integration signal.
Add an on.schedule weekly cron trigger and mirror reconcile-bridge.yml's JIRA_* env wiring and acli cache/download-verify-install/PATH+auth steps to the external-integration workflow.

Introduce a deterministic marker-based fail-on-all-skip Jira canary that auto-applies a jira_live marker to any module defining _live_jira_ready and fails the external session when jira_live tests are collected but none executed.
The canary session hook must be a no-op when REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL is unset and must not be masked or tripped by always-on tests.
The live Jira round-trip test performs real self-cleaning mutations (create/set-relationship/delete), so it requires a dedicated disposable test project.

Operator-attested acceptance requires configuring repo variables/secrets and a disposable Jira project, then recording a green workflow_dispatch run URL where the round-trip executed and the canary did not fire.
